title: Abundant Vegetation
description: Make biomes more natural, real and fun.
body:
Abundant Vegetation （枝繁叶茂） is a world-generated data package that improves most of the vanilla Overworld biomes. The goal of the packet is to aesthetically transform the world without altering the original too much.

 # 💡Features:
 -Natural steep slopes and cliffs

###  Future Plans
- Better trees
- Better distribution of flowers and plants

# 🖼️Screenshots
![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/47b3c5810d196315a1d8a09c5c11ddbdd76e7d70_0.webp)
![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ef3649b2ca0ac6b62e09be33f7d5377000496339_0.webp)

If the mod version is not working, it may have been overridden by another mod. Please switch to a data pack and set it to the top. If you are using epic terrain, please place it below.

### compatibility
- Since the Cliff feature uses Feature, the Cliff feature is invalid unless the biome references my Feature.
> - Vanilla Biome is currently supported
